entries.title: Android | Do More With Google on Android Phones & Devices
entries.summary:
* Android features intelligent eyewear, including audio glasses coming this fall
* Google Gemini is an AI assistant available on Android devices
* Android XR expands reality beyond screens, including headsets and glasses
* Circle to Search allows users to search with one gesture
* Google Messages brings fun features to chat, including photo remixing
* Android devices require internet connection for certain features
* Gemini mobile app availability varies by device, country, and language
* Android XR and other features have compatibility variations by device and region
* Google AI is integrated into various Android features and apps
* Product availability and specifications vary by region, carrier, and device

entries.source_url: https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Android_(オペレーティングシステム)
entries.title: Android (オペレーティングシステム) - Wikipedia
entries.summary:
* AndroidはGoogleが開発したモバイルオペレーティングシステム
* Linuxカーネルとオープンソースソフトウェアがベース
* プログラミング言語: C言語、Java、Kotlin
* OSの系統: Unix系
* カーネル: モノリシックカーネル
* ライセンス: Apache 2.0、GPL v2、LGPL
* プラットフォーム: ARM32、ARM64、MIPS、x86、x64
* アップデート方式: Over The Air (OTA)
* 使用できる言語: 日本語など100言語以上
* 主な競合: iOS、iPadOS、Windows Mobile、Windows Phone、Symbian OSなど
* Android supports multi-touch gestures like swiping and pinching
* Android devices have hardware components like gyroscopes, GPS, and accelerometers
* Android has a virtual keyboard for text input and supports external keyboards via Bluetooth or USB
* Android has a status bar that displays system information and notifications
* Android has a navigation bar with buttons for back, home, and multi-tasking
* Android supports installation of third-party IMEs (Input Method Editors) for text input
* Android has a standard C library called Bionic, which is designed for limited memory and processing capacity
* Android's kernel is based on Linux
* Android supports various network technologies like GSM, UMTS, CDMA2000, EV-DO, and LTE
* Android has a package manager called Google Play that allows users to download and install apps
* AndroidはglibcではなくBionicライブラリを使用
* BionicはFreeBSD、NetBSD、OpenBSDのコードを組み合わせて作成
* AndroidはLinuxカーネルに独自パッチを当てたAndroid共通カーネル（ACK）を使用
* サポートしているCPUはARM（ARMv5以降）、MIPS、x86
* Android Runtime（ART）が標準の仮想マシン
* Dalvik仮想マシンはメモリ消費を低く抑えた設計
* SQLiteがデータ保存用に組み込まれている
* Media Frameworkにより、H.263、H.264、H.265、MPEG-4 SPなどの映像と音声形式に対応
* プログラミング言語はC言語、C++、Rust（2021年から新規コードのデ

entries.title: Android Apps on Google Play
entries.summary:
* Android apps are available on various devices including Windows, Phone, Tablet, TV, Chromebook, Watch, and XR headset.
* Popular game genres include Strategy, Simulation, Action, Puzzle, and Role Playing.
* Top-rated games include Clash of Clans, Township, Free Fire MAX, and Clash Royale.
* Many games offer in-app purchases and have a rating system based on user reviews.
* Games can be categorized as free, paid, or grossing.
* Some games are available for purchase with prices ranging from $4.99 to $24.99.
* New games are constantly being added to the Google Play store.
* Games often have updates available to fix bugs or add new features.
* Some games offer rewards or challenges to complete, such as filling a sticker album.
* In-app purchases can be used to acquire virtual items or currency within a game.
* In-app purchases are available for most games.
* Update availability is common among listed games.
* Games have varying age ratings: Everyone, Everyone 10+, Teen.
* Limited-time events and characters are offered in games like Brawl Stars and Genshin Impact.
* Seasonal updates and new content are added to games like Chaos Zero Nightmare and AFK Journey.
* New heroes and characters are introduced in games like AFK Journey and Brawl Stars.
* Special outfits and items are available for purchase or unlock in games like Subway Surfers.
* Multiplayer action is a feature in games like Grand Hustle RP and Livetopia: Party.
* Games offer various rewards, such as Stellar Crystals, D

entries.title: Androidのスマートフォン 最新人気機種ランキング【2026年5月】
entries.summary:
* Top Android smartphones: Google Pixel 10a, AQUOS sense10, moto g66j 5G
* Display sizes: 6.1-6.7 inches
* Operating Systems: Android 15, Android 16, ColorOS 15 (based on Android 15)
* RAM/Storage: 64GB-512GB
* Battery capacities: 4300-5800mAh
* Camera resolutions: 12-50MP (main), 8-13MP (ultra-wide)
* Water and dust resistance: available on most models
* SIM card types: nano-SIM, eSIM
* Prices: ¥28,539-¥165,073 (new), ¥18,500-¥126,280 (used)
* Android versions: 14, 15, 16
* Display sizes: 6.1-6.83 inches
* Battery capacities: 5000-7025mAh
* RAM options: 12GB (SONY Xperia 1 VII)
* Storage options: 64GB, 128GB, 256GB, 512GB
* Camera resolutions: up to 200MP (Xiaomi REDMI Note 15 Pro 5G)
* Water and dust resistance: available on most models
* Operating Systems: Android, Nothing OS 4.1, ColorOS 15 and 16
* SIM options: nano-SIM, eSIM, SIM-free
* テザリング対応: スマートフォンを経由してWi-Fi対応のパソコンやタブレット端末などをインターネットにつなぐ機能
* NFC対応: 近距離無線通信（約10cmの距離で106〜424Kbps）
* MHL対応: スマートフォンの映像をmicroUSB経由でテレビ画面やPC用モニターに出力
* 4K撮影対応: 4K解像度の高精細な映像を撮影
* 5G: 第5世代移動通信システム（高速、大容量、多接続、低遅延）
* eSIM: 内蔵されたSIM（SIMカードの差し替え不要）
* ワイヤレス充電（Qi）: ワイヤレス給電の国際標準規格
* デュアルSIM: 2つのSIMが使える端末
* MIL規格: アメリカ国防総省が定めている品質基準
* 内蔵メモリ（ROM）とRAM: データの保存容量とアプリケーションの動作領域の容量

entries.title: Android OSの全バージョン一覧（2025年最新） | アプリの鎖
entries.summary:
* Android OS versions are named in alphabetical order, with earlier versions named after desserts.
* Android 10 and later versions do not have official code names, but unofficial names are still used.
* Android versions and release years: 
  * Android 16 (2025)
  * Android 15 (2024)
  * Android 14 (2023)
  * Android 13 (2022)
  * Android 12 (2021)
* Major Android updates typically occur in summer or fall.
* Current dominant Android versions are Android 15 and 14.
* Android 16 is the latest version, released in June 2025.
* Unofficial code names are still used, e.g., Android 15 is "Vanilla Ice Cream".
* Android versions prior to 10 have official dessert-themed code names, e.g., KitKat, Lollipop, Marshmallow.

entries.title: Flutter - Build apps for any screen
entries.summary:
* Flutter is an open-source framework for building multi-platform applications.
* Flutter code compiles to ARM or Intel machine code and JavaScript for fast performance.
* Hot Reload allows for quick build and iteration with almost instant code updates.
* Flutter supports deployment to multiple devices from a single codebase: mobile, web, desktop, and embedded devices.
* Flutter is powered by the Dart language, optimized for fast apps on any platform.
* Automated testing and developer tooling are available for building production-quality apps.
* Flutter has seamless integration with Google services like Firebase, Google Ads, and Google Maps.
* The framework is supported by Google and maintained by a global community of developers.
* Flutter allows for customized, adaptive designs with control over every pixel.
* Dart packages are available on pub.dev for extending Flutter functionality.
* Flutter is a framework for building apps
* Supports building apps for any screen
* Offers instant access to its power
* Installation is available
* Documentation is provided
* Getting started is a straightforward process
* Flutter has a dedicated website (flutter.dev) 
* Offers a newsletter for updates and information

entries.title: GitHub - flutter/flutter: Flutter makes it easy and fast to ...
entries.summary:
* Flutter is Google's SDK for building mobile, web, and desktop apps from a single codebase.
* Flutter works with existing code and is free and open source.
* The Flutter tool downloads resources from Google servers and requires agreement to Google Terms of Service.
* The Dart SDK is downloaded from Google servers when Flutter is first run or upgraded.
* Flutter has a layered architecture for control over every pixel on the screen.
* Flutter supports iOS, Android, web, Windows, macOS, and Linux platforms.
* The Flutter SDK includes tools for building, testing, and debugging apps.
* Flutter has a large community with 176k stars and 30.4k forks on GitHub.
* The Flutter repository includes documentation, examples, and contributing guidelines.
* Flutter uses the Dart programming language for app development.
* Flutter uses a layered architecture for control over every pixel on the screen.
* It includes a full set of widgets for pixel-perfect experiences on iOS (Cupertino) and other platforms (Material).
* Flutter is powered by hardware-accelerated 2D graphics libraries like Skia and Impeller.
* It uses the Dart programming language, which enables compilation to various machine codes.
* Flutter supports stateful hot reload for instant code changes without restarting the app.
* It provides tens of thousands of packages to speed up development.
* Flutter supports FFI (Foreign Function Interface) for accessing native code on Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows.
* It includes editor plug

entries.title: Get Started: Install - Flutter
entries.summary:
* Flutter installation is the first step in getting started with the framework.
* The installation process varies by operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux).
* Special instructions are provided for users in China.
* Flutter has its own set of tools and IDEs for development.
* The framework supports hot reload, testing, and debugging.
* Flutter provides a range of APIs for device and SDK interactions.
* The framework supports internationalization and platform-specific code.
* Users can build and release apps for Android and iOS.
* Flutter has a layered design and rendering pipeline.
* Additional resources are available, including a technical overview and architecture diagrams.

entries.title: Flutter Tutorial - GeeksforGeeks
entries.summary:
* Flutter is Google's mobile SDK for building native Android and iOS apps from a single codebase.
* Flutter uses the Dart programming language and provides ready-to-use widgets for designing user interfaces.
* Hot reload is a special feature of Flutter that allows developers to see changes instantly as they code.
* Flutter apps are built using widgets, which are the blocks that make up the user interface.
* Prerequisites for learning Flutter include a strong grasp of Dart programming, familiarity with Android Studio, and knowledge of web scripting languages like HTML, JavaScript, and CSS.
* Flutter provides a rich library of built-in widgets, including buttons, text fields, layouts, and animations.
* Widgets in Flutter can be either stateful or stateless, with stateful widgets having their own state and stateless widgets relying on their parent widget for state.
* The MaterialApp class is a top-level widget in Flutter that provides a basic material design visual layout structure.
* Flutter supports development on multiple platforms, including Android, iOS, web, and desktop.
* Key Flutter widgets include AppBar, FloatingActionButton, BottomNavigationBar, Drawer, Container, and ListView.
* Flutter provides pre-built UI components like buttons, text fields, and sliders.
* Icon, Expanded, and Checkbox are some of the available widget classes in Flutter.
* Flutter supports various layout components like Carousel Slider, Staggered Grid View, and Tabs.
* Customizable fonts, themes,

entries.title: Flutter (software) - Wikipedia
entries.summary:
* Written in: C, C++, Dart
* Platforms: Android, iOS, Google Fuchsia, Web platform, Linux, macOS, Windows
* License: New BSD License
* Architecture: Based on widgets, similar to React
* Widget types: Stateless, Stateful
* Rendering: Custom rendering engine, outputs pixel data directly to screen
* Key feature: Hot reload, allows instant code changes without restarting
* Framework components: Material Design, Cupertino widgets
* Development kit: Open-source UI software development kit (SDK) for cross-platform applications
* Flutter uses Material Design and Cupertino widgets for Android and iOS platforms.
* Flutter apps are written in the Dart language.
* Ahead-of-time (AOT) compilation is used for release versions of Flutter apps on all platforms except the Web.
* The Web version of Flutter apps is transpiled to JavaScript or WebAssembly.
* Flutter's engine is written primarily in C++ and uses Google's Skia graphics library or the custom "Impeller" graphics layer.
* The engine interfaces with platform-specific SDKs for features like accessibility and native plugin support.
* Dart's Pub package manager is used for publishing and using custom packages and plugins.
* Flutter supports null-safety, which was made mandatory in Dart 3.
* The Foundation library provides basic classes and functions for constructing Flutter applications.
* Flutter's rendering support uses either Skia or the custom "Impeller" graphics layer.
* Flutter 2.0 introduced support for web platform and desktop be
